domain_hint: Conjugate heat transfer simulation of HPT turbine blade serpentine internal cooling passages, AETHER-7 program, validated against AFRL scaled cascade rig data
ambiguity_notes: (1) Turbulence model specification: simulation plan (Slide 3/§3) states SST k-ω throughout, but archived STAR-CCM+ XML shows realizable k-ε in internal passages — contradictory documentation of actual model configuration. (2) Radiation boundary condition: executive summary states "radiation captured via effective emissivity BC" but physics XML and analyst confirmation show radiation is OFF in Rev C — directly contradictory claims in same document set. (3) Uncertainty interval: ±25 K stated in executive summary as derived quantity, but Slide 6 body text admits it is "engineering judgment" not traceable to sensitivity sweep; Slide 10 analysis implies the interval is underestimated — contradictory rigor claims. (4) Leading-edge validation error magnitude: Slide 5 states ~21% underprediction; Slide 15 data table shows 17.1% for Rev C — inconsistent figures across the same deck without clear explanation of which dataset applies.
